meaning: International Education Association国际教育协会
examples: The IEA quickly defended its analysis Tuesday.
Peak oil critics have often questioned the IEA figures.
The IEA yesterday revised downward its demand outlook for 2009.
The IEA also revised its 2011 oil demand projections upward by 0.2 million barrels per day.
By 2020, the IEA projects that the US will be a net exporter of natural gas.
